title: PJ Pet Products Beefy Munchy Bones – 11 cm Dog Chews | Natural Low Fat Dog Treats | High Protein Adult and Puppy Treats for Small & Large Dogs | Training Food & Daily Pet Snacks – 40 Bones x 12g
features: Beefy Munchy Dog Treats: Delicious beef-flavored dog chews measuring 11 cm, perfect for rewarding your dog and satisfying their chewing instincts.
High Protein, Low Fat Formula: With 46.5% protein and only 1.65% fat, these natural low fat dog treats support healthy muscles and are suitable for daily feeding
Great for Training & Rewards: These puppy training treats and dog training treats are ideal for both puppies and adult dogs during obedience or behavior reinforcement.
Suitable for All Dog Sizes: Whether you need dog treats for small dogs or chews for dogs large, these sticks for dogs work for all breed sizes.
Everyday Pet Snack or Gift: Perfect for use as pet dog treats, munchies dog treats, or even a thoughtful dog birthday present.
